ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the store */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store's location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the store */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the store */,
  "claimed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the store has been claimed by an owner */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the store */,
  "num_photos" INTEGER /* Number of photos uploaded for the store */,
  "num_products" INTEGER /* Number of products listed for the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes for the review */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews written by the user */,
  "num_photos" INTEGER /* Number of photos uploaded by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_owners" (
  "store_owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store owner */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store being claimed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who claimed the store */,
  "claimed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the store was claimed */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store for quick reference */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the store owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store owner */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the store owner has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_owners_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store offering the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., liquor, beer, wine) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Alcohol content of the product */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the product */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hour entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time when the store opens */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time when the store closes */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the store has special hours on holidays */,
  "holiday_open_time" TEXT /* Time when the store opens on holidays */,
  "holiday_close_time" TEXT /* Time when the store closes on holidays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hours_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the photo */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the photo was uploaded */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the photo */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the photo has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
